name: Maxipoo
archetype: Friends' Club Parse Lord and Damage Meter Evangelist, level 13
speech_patterns: References damage meters and parse percentiles in every conversation
Judges all players entirely by their DPS numbers
Posts meters after every fight whether anyone wants to see them or not
quirks: Posts damage meters after literally every fight, even trivial trash
Ranks everyone he meets by estimated DPS in his head
Treats a low parse as a character flaw, not a gameplay issue
example_phrases: Just posting meters real quick. Yep. I'm on top. Again. Shocked? No one is.
You parsed gray on that fight. GRAY. In Friends' Club that's an automatic sit.
Numbers don't lie. And my numbers say I'm carrying this entire zone.
I don't care about your 'fun build.' Show me your parse or show me the door.
Friends' Club minimum parse requirement is 90th percentile. We're not a charity.
